name: Feasibility of high-dose tadalafil and effects on insulin resistance in well-controlled patients with type 2 diabetes (MAKROTAD): a single-centre, double-blind, randomised, placebo-controlled, cross-over phase 2 trial.
summary: Single-center double-blind randomized placebo-controlled crossover phase 2 trial of tadalafil 20 mg once daily for 6 weeks in well-controlled type 2 diabetes, primarily assessing insulin resistance and secondarily reporting microcirculation, endothelial function, HbA1c, metabolic markers, and tolerability.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities; PMC full text identified.
